metadata.title: Martijn Pannekoek | Software Architect
metadata.description: Portfolio of Martijn Pannekoek, a software architect specializing in scalable systems, cloud, AI, and product development.
metadata.blogTitle: Software Architecture and Development Blog | Martijn Pannekoek
metadata.blogDescription: Articles by Martijn Pannekoek about software architecture, .NET, databases, cloud, AI, and modern product development.
metadata.collaborateDescription: Got a digital idea? I’m happy to think along, help with technical choices, and build it with you when it feels like a good fit.

speech.collaborate: Shall we map out a great route?

footer.summary: I enjoy thinking along on digital ideas and helping them move forward where I can.

collaboratePage.title: Got a good idea?
collaboratePage.description: I like thinking along on ideas that are useful, interesting, or simply worth making. Sometimes a fresh perspective is enough. Sometimes it’s more fun to actually build it.

heroImage.alt: Martijn Pannekoek on a city terrace overlooking the water

landscapeImage.alt: A cyclist follows a winding road through a green, hilly landscape

contributions.title: Maybe I can help
contributions.description: By sharpening the idea, figuring out technical choices, or building something that works. A website, app, prototype, or something that doesn’t have a name yet. You don’t need a complete plan.

think.title: Think it through
think.description: Figure out together what you really want to make.

make.title: Make it
make.description: Go from a first version to something you can use.

improve.title: Improve it
improve.description: See what could be simpler, smarter, or nicer to use.

contact.title: Want to talk?
contact.description: Tell me what’s been on your mind and why you want to make it. Then we can see if it clicks and what kind of setup feels right.

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.message: Tell me a little about your idea. It doesn’t have to be finished.

mailto.fallbackBody: I have an idea on my mind and would love to tell you more about it.
mailto.subject: An idea from your website

about.title: Who am I?
about.description: I'm Martijn, a software architect with a passion for building scalable and efficient systems. I have experience in various programming languages and frameworks, and I enjoy exploring new technologies. Feel free to check out my <blog>blog</blog> for insights on software development, architecture, and more!

insights.title: Insights
insights.placeholderExcerpt: Fresh articles are on the way. Check back soon for new insights.

toolkit.title: Toolkit
toolkit.description: I have 15 years of programming experience across backend, cloud, and product development. Lately, I have been focusing more on AI-driven product development and agentic workflows. I enjoy solving complex problems, and I keep learning every day to stay sharp with new tools, patterns, and technologies.
